title: Shipping & Delivery
text: Hubmicroo delivers across Pakistan. Orders in Lahore, Karachi and Islamabad are delivered within 2 to 3 working days. Other cities take 3 to 5 working days. Delivery is free on orders above 5000 PKR; below that a flat 250 PKR delivery charge applies. Cash on delivery is available nationwide. You will receive an SMS with a tracking number once your order ships.

title: Returns & Refunds
text: Products can be returned within 7 days of delivery if they are unused and in original packaging. To start a return, contact Hubmicroo support with your order number. Refunds are processed within 5 to 7 working days after the returned item passes inspection. Items damaged by misuse are not eligible for return. Warranty claims are handled separately according to the brand warranty.

title: Payment Methods
text: Hubmicroo accepts Cash on Delivery, bank transfer, JazzCash and Easypaisa. Card payments are accepted online through a secure gateway. Prices on the website are in Pakistani Rupees (PKR) and include applicable taxes.

title: About Hubmicroo
text: Hubmicroo is a Pakistani online store for electronics and accessories including audio devices, wearables, computer accessories and chargers. We focus on genuine products, fair prices and fast local delivery. Our support team is available 7 days a week.

title: Contact & Support
text: You can reach Hubmicroo support by phone at 03137938402 or by email at Hubmicroo@gmail.com. Support is available from 9 AM to 9 PM, seven days a week. For order issues, please keep your order number ready.
